scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: 'मुझे नौकरी मिल गई' को English में कैसे कहेंगे? [How do you say 'I got the job' in English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a practical, real-world English translation challenge instead of a random trivia question.
- Replaces the scammy fake-money notification with a positive learning milestone (XP/Goal reached).
- Establishes Supernova as a tool for career and personal growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Translate: 'मुझे नौकरी मिल गई!' (How do you say 'I got the job!')
A. I got the job!
B. I get job!
C. I getting job!
Supernova App - 20:00
Daily Goal Reached
+ 50 XP
Keep up the great speaking practice!
बिना डरे English बोलने के लिए Download कीजिये Supernova App (To speak English without fear, Download Supernova App)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Supernova के AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ बोलकर practice करें और अपना confidence बढ़ाएं। [Practice speaking daily with Supernova's AI Tutor and build your confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the practical utility of the app in everyday situations (translating bank SMS).
- Introduces the AI Tutor feature as a safe space to practice speaking.
- Delivers a warm, encouraging call-to-action to download the app.
